zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Windsor於1441年1月21日出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Miles de Windsor31歲，母親Joan de Green27歲。他於1466年2月1日與Elizabeth Stratton Andrews在英國素福爾可貝利哈姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1484年被列為constable of windsor castle。他去世於1485年9月29日在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯坦維爾享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞斯坦維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Windsor于1441年1月21日出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Miles de Windsor31岁，母亲Joan de Green27岁。他于1466年2月1日与Elizabeth Stratton Andrews在英国素福爾可貝利哈姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1484年被列为constable of windsor castle。他去世于1485年9月29日在英国英格兰米德萊可斯坦維爾享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞斯坦維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Windsor was born on 21 January 1441, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Miles de Windsor, was 31 and his mother, Joan de Green, was 27. He married Elizabeth Stratton Andrews on 1 February 1466, in Baylham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. In 1484, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as constable of windsor castle. He died on 29 September 1485, in Stanwell, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Stanwell, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Windsor est né le 21 janvier 1441, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Miles de Windsor, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan de Green, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stratton Andrews le 1 février 1466, à Baylham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. En 1484, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of windsor castle. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1485, à Stanwell, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Stanwell, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Windsor am 21. Januar 1441 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Miles de Windsor 31 und seine Mutter Joan de Green 27. Er hat am 1. Februar 1466 in Baylham, Suffolk, England Elizabeth Stratton Andrews geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1484, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of windsor castle aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. September 1485 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Stanwell, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stanwell, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Windsor è nato il il 21 gennaio 1441 nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Miles de Windsor, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Green, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stratton Andrews il 1 febbraio 1466, nel Baylham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Nel 1484, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of windsor castle. Morì il 29 settembre 1485, nel Stanwell, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Stanwell, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Windsorが1441年1月21日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Miles de Windsorは31歳，母Joan de Greenは27歳であった。1466年2月1日にイギリススフォルクバイルハムでElizabeth Stratton Andrewsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。1484年，43歳の時，職業はconstable of windsor castleと記録されている。彼は1485年9月29日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックススタンウエルで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリースタンウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 홀이 트리니티 민리스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Windsor(이)가 1441년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Miles de Windsor(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Green(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1466년 2월 1일 영국 수폴크 베이함에서 Elizabeth Stratton Andrews(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1484년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of windsor castle이었다. 그는 1485년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스탠웰에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 스탠웰에 묻혔다.

pt.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Windsor nasceu em 21 de janeiro de 1441, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Miles de Windsor, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Green, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stratton Andrews em 1 de fevereiro de 1466, em Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Em 1484, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of windsor castle. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1485, em Stanwell, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Stanwell, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: холи тринити минориесь, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Windsor родился 21 января 1441 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Miles de Windsor было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Green, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stratton Andrews 1 февраля 1466 г. в местности беилхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. В 1484 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии constable of windsor castle. Он умер 29 сентября 1485 г. в местности станвелл, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности станвелл, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Windsor nació el 21 de enero de 1441, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Miles de Windsor, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan de Green, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stratton Andrews el 1 de febrero de 1466, en Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. En 1484, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of windsor castle. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1485, en Stanwell, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Stanwell, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
